{{Infobox artifact
| name = Lightcaster IV
| introduced = lh-01-the-captain
}}

''See also: [[Lightcaster IV Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The Lightcaster IV is a widely distributed plasma pistol that functions as a piece of [[Aethertech]]. Known for its reliability in various environments, including vacuums where standard plasma weaponry often fails, the device is marketed with the slogan that it works anywhere. It serves as a common sidearm for various individuals, including soldiers and travelers, and is often carried alongside more traditional magical implements like wands or staves. The weapon fires plasma bolts and can be used for offense, such as targeting enemies or disabling technology, or defensively, such as being used to create barriers. Variations of this technology exist, including the [[Suncaster L-14]] heavy plasma launcher and the [[Lightcaster Heavy II]], which is specifically designed for use by Karoshans or soldiers wearing powered armor.}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The Lightcaster IV is a plasma pistol capable of functioning within any atmosphere. This weapon fires shots, which [[Varic]] utilizes to shoot bolts during combat. The [[Captain]] also employs a Lightcaster to cast protective barriers. Additionally, the narrator keeps a Lightcaster concealed within a warded pocket.}}

{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The protagonist uses a weapon called the [[Lightcaster IV]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c3">''The Captain'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Lightcaster IV]] is a plasma pistol that works in any atmosphere.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c8">''The Captain'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Varic]] uses a Lightcaster to shoot bolts.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c11">''The Captain'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Captain]] uses a Lightcaster to cast barriers.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c13">''The Captain'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|A Lightcaster is a weapon that fires shots.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c14">''The Captain'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The narrator possesses a Lightcaster hidden in a warded pocket.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c23">''The Captain'', chapter 23</ref>}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The narrator uses a Lightcaster.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c12">''The Engineer'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The narrator possesses a [[Lightcaster IV]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c15">''The Engineer'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Lightcasters]] are weapons that work anywhere.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c3">''The Knight'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Lightcaster IV]] is a plasma pistol.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c22">''The Knight'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The Lightcaster is a [[pistol]] used by the narrator.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c20">''The Pilot'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The narrator uses a Lightcaster when enemies get too close.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c26">''The Pilot'', chapter 26</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Omega]] can conjure a Lightcaster.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c36">''The Pilot'', chapter 36</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon artifacts]]
